calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee, CSR# 42880. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-06-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
Mr. Marcalini, Esq. specially appearing on behalf of plaintiff C.B. Merchant Services
Craig K. Martin, Esq. appearing on behalf of defendant Netra Roston

Matter settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Defendant Netra Roston to pay plaintiff C. B. Merchant Services the sum of $1,500.00. Periodic payments to be made with last payment ending December 2006. All parties agreed to the terms of the settlement.

Hon. Robert Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Okazaki Reporter: JoAnn Bryce (206)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Set For Trial On Feb-14-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
